final:
// // This comment is misleading because it suggests that the output w is only true when x, y, and z are all false, which is incorrect according to the truth table.
module truth_table_logic (
        input x,
        input y,
        input z,
        output w);

assign w = (~x & ~y & ~z) |
           (~x & y & ~z) |
           (x & ~y & z) |
           (x & y & z);

endmodule
